request_text: Add order status tracking to the customer account page
rationale: Clause 2.1 includes order status tracking.

request_text: Customers should be able to filter products by category
rationale: Clause 2.3 includes category filtering.

request_text: Improve product search to match partial names
rationale: Clause 2.3 includes product search; partial matching refines the included function.

request_text: Show the items in the shopping cart with their quantities
rationale: Clause 2.1 includes shopping cart management.

request_text: Let customers create an order from their cart
rationale: Clause 2.1 includes order creation.

request_text: Shoppers want to see where their purchase is in the process
rationale: Seeing where a purchase is = order status tracking, Clause 2.1 — no 'order status' keywords.

request_text: Narrow the product list down to a chosen product family
rationale: Product family narrowing = category filtering, Clause 2.3.

request_text: Customers keep items aside while they continue browsing
rationale: Keeping items aside = the shopping cart, Clause 2.1.

request_text: Find goods by typing part of their name
rationale: Finding goods by name = product search, Clause 2.3.

request_text: Turn a filled basket into a confirmed purchase
rationale: Basket → confirmed purchase = order creation, Clause 2.1.

request_text: Accept Bitcoin payments at checkout
rationale: Clause 6.1 explicitly excludes cryptocurrency payment.

request_text: Add cryptocurrency as a payment option
rationale: Clause 6.1 excludes cryptocurrency payment.

request_text: Integrate our sellers with the Amazon marketplace
rationale: Clause 6.1 excludes third-party marketplace seller integration.

request_text: Let third-party marketplace sellers list their products on our site
rationale: Clause 6.1 excludes marketplace seller integration.

request_text: Customers want to pay with digital coins like they do on other sites
rationale: Digital coins = cryptocurrency, excluded by Clause 6.1 — no 'crypto'/'bitcoin' keywords.

request_text: Open our store so outside merchants can sell through us
rationale: Outside merchants selling through the store = marketplace seller integration, excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: Support checkout using blockchain-based currencies
rationale: Blockchain-based currencies = cryptocurrency, excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: Add a payment provider that settles in Bitcoin
rationale: Wears the included payment-provider vocabulary (2.2), but the deliverable is crypto payment — excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: Show marketplace sellers' products in our catalog
rationale: Wears catalog vocabulary (2.3), but requires marketplace seller integration — excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: A cart checkout flow that pays with cryptocurrency
rationale: Wears cart vocabulary (2.1), but the deliverable is crypto payment — excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: A customer loyalty points program
rationale: No clause covers loyalty programs — change request.

request_text: Offer gift wrapping as an option at checkout
rationale: No clause covers gift services; checkout-adjacent vocabulary but a new capability — change request.

request_text: Send reminder emails for abandoned carts
rationale: No clause covers email campaigns; cart vocabulary but the deliverable (automated emails) is a new capability — change request.

request_text: Product reviews and star ratings
rationale: No clause covers reviews/ratings — change request.

request_text: Display prices in multiple currencies
rationale: No clause covers multi-currency display — change request.

request_text: We want to support 5 payment providers
rationale: Clause 2.2 caps payment provider integrations at 3; 5 exceeds the limit — change request.

request_text: Integrate 4 payment providers for our regional markets
rationale: Clause 2.2 caps providers at 3; 4 exceeds the limit — change request.

request_text: Add PayPal as an additional payment provider
rationale: Within the provider limit (2.2) but the 30-hour payment effort pool is already exhausted by history (37h logged, incl. a 25h experiment); a ~12h provider integration cannot fit — change request.

request_text: payments
rationale: A single word names no deliverable; the PMO must clarify.

request_text: Make the shop faster
rationale: No concrete deliverable; performance work maps to no clause — clarify.

request_text: The cart page crashes when adding more than 10 items
rationale: Defect in delivered cart functionality — bug-fix maintenance under Clause 7.1.

request_text: Order status shows the wrong state after a refund
rationale: Defect in delivered order tracking — maintenance under Clause 7.1 (phrased without crash/error vocabulary).

request_text: Product search is broken since the last release
rationale: Defect in delivered search — maintenance under Clause 7.1.

request_text: Kripto para ile ödeme alalım
rationale: Turkish request against the English contract: crypto payment is excluded by Clause 6.1.

request_text: Sepete ürün ekleme akışında adet seçimi olsun
rationale: Turkish request: quantity selection in the add-to-cart flow — cart management, Clause 2.1.

request_text: Ürünleri kategoriye göre filtreleyebilelim
rationale: Turkish request: category filtering — Clause 2.3.
